P

pCB - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.AddItemTab
ComboBox for selecting a Platform entity.
PLAT_COLUMN_ID - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
Primary key for platforms table.
PLAT_COLUMN_NAME - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
Name of the platforms or studio.
platform - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game
Platform on which the game is available
Platform - Class in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo
Represents a Platform entity in the system.
Platform(int, String) - Constructor for class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Platform
Constructs a Platform object.
PlatformDAO - Interface in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.dao
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Platform entities.
PlatformTable - Class in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables
Data Access Object implementation for Platform entities.
PlatformTable() - Constructor for class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables.PlatformTable
Private constructor to prevent instantiation.
play(Stage, Runnable) - Static method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.utils.IntroAnimation
Plays the intro animation on the given stage.
playAnimation() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.StatisticsTab
Plays a scale animation on the pie chart to enhance visual presentation when data is updated.
PROMPTS - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.AddItemTab
Placeholder prompt texts used for ComboBox selections in the Add Game form.
